title: Bazi Destined Partner Portrait Report AI
sourceTitle: Bazi Destined Partner Portrait Report AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical entertainment-style bazi destined-partner portrait report generated from fictional birth-date and bazi profile provided by the user, focused on entertainment relationship overview and partner portrait direction. Subject: A realistic East Asian adult partner portrait becomes the central visual result, with appearance, temperament, wardrobe mood, and relationship cues inferred from the user-provided symbolic bazi profile and organized through birth data summary, element balance, partner portrait area, compatibility labels, first-meeting cards, friendly disclaimer. Scene: Clean modern light-gradient dossier page with rounded white cards, thin dividers, soft icon accents, portrait area, compatibility badge, zodiac possibility chips, fate keyword tags, about-Ta section, and first-meeting prediction cards. Composition: Fixed 3:4 vertical relationship report layout: top title and AI entertainment subtitle, central half-body realistic portrait, lower-right gold compatibility badge, horizontal zodiac and keyword strip, four-row about-Ta information block, two-column first-meeting time and scene cards, and clear bottom disclaimer. Signature Elements: Realistic partner portrait, entertainment relationship overview and partner portrait direction, birth data summary, element balance, partner portrait area, compatibility labels, first-meeting cards, friendly disclaimer, gold soul-compatibility badge, two zodiac chips, five rounded fate keywords, four about-Ta rows with icons, two first-meeting cards, and friendly entertainment framing. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Light white-to-warm gradient background, clean white cards, soft gray dividers, champagne-gold badge accents, muted warm neutrals, dark readable text, and restrained romantic highlights. Lighting: Natural soft portrait lighting with gentle facial modeling, subtle card shadows, polished UI glow, and a bright clean report-page feeling. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: Chinese entertainment labels appear as short readable Chinese labels for title, subtitle, zodiac possibilities, fate keywords, personality, daily relationship mode, career direction, caution note, meeting time, meeting scene, and entertainment disclaimer. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
